query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO `integration_providers` (`id`, `slug`, `name`, `description`, `category`, `ownership_tier`, `auth_method`, `base_url`, `docs_url`, `signup_url`, `free_tier_description`, `free_tier_limit`, `logo_url`, `is_active`) VALUES
('b10d5b9f-7a31-4492-a944-4466f7594ee1', 'salesforce-crm', 'Salesforce CRM', 'Enterprise CRM for client relationship management, pipeline tracking, and activity logging.', 'crm', 'organization', 'oauth2', 'https://login.salesforce.com', 'https://developer.salesforce.com/docs', 'https://www.salesforce.com/form/signup/freetrial-sales/', '30-day free trial with full feature access', '30 days', NULL, 1),
('c91b1202-acb1-478b-be10-8537b3766d5b', 'hubspot-crm', 'HubSpot CRM', 'Free CRM with contact management, deal tracking, and email integration.', 'crm', 'organization', 'oauth2', 'https://api.hubapi.com', 'https://developers.hubspot.com/docs', 'https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm', 'Free tier with unlimited contacts and basic CRM features', 'Unlimited contacts', NULL, 1),
('c7537702-109b-4143-9ef5-b184dde9f711', 'wealthbox-crm', 'Wealthbox CRM', 'Purpose-built CRM for financial advisors with compliance workflows and client portal.', 'crm', 'professional', 'api_key', 'https://api.wealthbox.com/v1', 'https://dev.wealthbox.com', 'https://www.wealthbox.com/pricing', '14-day free trial', '14 days', NULL, 1),
('a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890', 'redtail-crm', 'Redtail CRM', 'Financial services CRM with compliance archiving and workflow automation.', 'crm', 'professional', 'api_key', 'https://api.redtailtechnology.com/crm/v1', 'https://corporate.redtailtechnology.com/api', 'https://corporate.redtailtechnology.com/pricing', '30-day free trial', '30 days', NULL, 1),
('d4e5f6a7-b8c9-0123-4567-890abcdef012', 'twilio-messaging', 'Twilio', 'Programmable SMS, voice, and WhatsApp messaging for client communications.', 'messaging', 'organization', 'api_key', 'https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01', 'https://www.twilio.com/docs', 'https://www.twilio.com/try-twilio', 'Free trial with $15.50 credit', '$15.50 credit', NULL, 1),
('e5f6a7b8-c9d0-1234-5678-90abcdef0123', 'sendgrid-email', 'SendGrid', 'Transactional and marketing email delivery with analytics and templates.', 'messaging', 'organization', 'api_key', 'https://api.sendgrid.com/v3', 'https://docs.sendgrid.com', 'https://signup.sendgrid.com/', '100 emails/day free forever', '100 emails/day', NULL, 1),
('f6a7b8c9-d0e1-2345-6789-0abcdef01234', 'applied-epic', 'Applied Epic', 'Insurance agency management system for policy administration, accounting, and client management.', 'carrier', 'organization', 'oauth2', 'https://api.appliedsystems.com', 'https://developer.appliedsystems.com', 'https://www.appliedsystems.com/contact', NULL, NULL, NULL, 1),
('a7b8c9d0-e1f2-3456-7890-abcdef012345', 'vertafore-ams360', 'Vertafore AMS360', 'Insurance agency management with carrier connectivity and commission tracking.', 'carrier', 'organization', 'api_key', 'https://api.vertafore.com', 'https://developer.vertafore.com', 'https://www.vertafore.com/contact', NULL, NULL, NULL, 1),
('b8c9d0e1-f2a3-4567-8901-bcdef0123456', 'plaid-investments', 'Plaid', 'Financial account aggregation for investment accounts, balances, and transactions.', 'investments', 'platform', 'api_key', 'https://production.plaid.com', 'https://plaid.com/docs', 'https://dashboard.plaid.com/signup', '100 items in sandbox, pay-per-use in production', '100 sandbox items', NULL, 1),
('c9d0e1f2-a3b4-5678-9012-cdef01234567', 'yodlee-aggregation', 'Yodlee (Envestnet)', 'Financial data aggregation covering 17,000+ financial institutions worldwide.', 'investments', 'platform', 'oauth2', 'https://production.api.yodlee.com/ysl', 'https://developer.yodlee.com', 'https://developer.yodlee.com/user/register', 'Sandbox environment with test data', 'Sandbox only', NULL, 1),
('d0e1f2a3-b4c5-6789-0123-def012345678', 'morningstar-data', 'Morningstar Data', 'Investment research data including fund ratings, performance, and portfolio analytics.', 'investments', 'platform', 'api_key', 'https://api.morningstar.com/v2', 'https://developer.morningstar.com', 'https://developer.morningstar.com/register', 'Limited API calls on developer tier', '500 calls/month', NULL, 1),
('e1f2a3b4-c5d6-7890-1234-ef0123456789', 'ipipeline-insurance', 'iPipeline', 'Life insurance quoting, e-application, and underwriting automation.', 'insurance', 'organization', 'api_key', 'https://api.ipipeline.com', 'https://developer.ipipeline.com', 'https://www.ipipeline.com/contact', NULL, NULL, NULL, 1),
('f2a3b4c5-d6e7-8901-2345-f01234567890', 'census-bureau', 'US Census Bureau', 'Demographic data including population, income, education, and housing statistics.', 'demographics', 'platform', 'api_key', 'https://api.census.gov/data', 'https://www.census.gov/data/developers.html', 'https://api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html', 'Free with API key, 500 requests/day', '500 requests/day', NULL, 1),
('a3b4c5d6-e7f8-9012-3456-012345678901', 'bls-data', 'Bureau of Labor Statistics', 'Employment, inflation (CPI), wages, and productivity data.', 'economic', 'platform', 'api_key', 'https://api.bls.gov/publicAPI/v2', 'https://www.bls.gov/developers/', 'https://data.bls.gov/registrationEngine/', 'Free with registration, 500 daily queries', '500 queries/day', NULL, 1),
('b4c5d6e7-f8a9-0123-4567-123456789012', 'fred-data', 'FRED (Federal Reserve)', 'Economic data including interest rates, GDP, unemployment, and monetary policy indicators.', 'economic', 'platform', 'api_key', 'https://api.stlouisfed.org/fred', 'https://fred.stlouisfed.org/docs/api/fred/', 'https://fredaccount.stlouisfed.org/apikeys', 'Free with API key, 120 requests/minute', '120 requests/min', NULL, 1),
('c5d6e7f8-a9b0-1234-5678-234567890123', 'sec-edgar', 'SEC EDGAR', 'SEC filings, company disclosures, and regulatory documents.', 'regulatory', 'platform', 'none', 'https://efts.sec.gov/LATEST', 'https://www.sec.gov/edgar/searchedgar/efulltext.htm', NULL, 'Free public access, 10 requests/second', '10 requests/sec', NULL, 1),
('d6e7f8a9-b0c1-2345-6789-345678901234', 'finra-brokercheck', 'FINRA BrokerCheck', 'Broker and advisor background verification, disciplinary history, and registration status.', 'regulatory', 'platform', 'none', 'https://api.brokercheck.finra.org', 'https://www.finra.org/brokercheck', NULL, 'Free public access', 'Rate limited', NULL, 1),
('e7f8a9b0-c1d2-3456-7890-456789012345', 'fullstory-enrichment', 'FullStory', 'Digital experience analytics with session replay and behavioral insights.', 'enrichment', 'platform', 'api_key', 'https://api.fullstory.com', 'https://developer.fullstory.com', 'https://www.fullstory.com/plans/', 'Free tier with 1,000 sessions/month', '1,000 sessions/month', NULL, 1),
('f8a9b0c1-d2e3-4567-8901-567890123456', 'zapier-middleware', 'Zapier', 'No-code automation platform connecting 6,000+ apps with triggers and actions.', 'middleware', 'organization', 'api_key', 'https://hooks.zapier.com', 'https://platform.zapier.com/docs', 'https://zapier.com/sign-up', 'Free tier with 100 tasks/month and 5 zaps', '100 tasks/month', NULL, 1),
('a9b0c1d2-e3f4-5678-9012-678901234567', 'zillow-property', 'Zillow (Bridge Interactive)', 'Property valuation, listing data, and real estate market analytics.', 'property', 'platform', 'api_key', 'https://api.bridgedataoutput.com/api/v2', 'https://bridgedataoutput.com/docs/explorer', 'https://bridgedataoutput.com/register', '1,000 API calls/day on developer plan', '1,000 calls/day', NULL, 1);
